title: Aurora, 31385, Mini Flopsie Howie Hippo, 8In, Soft Toy, Grey
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Aurora World Mini Flopsie Howie Hippo Plush Toy Howie the Mini Flopsie Hippo is lovingly crafted and meticulously designed to provide its recipient with years of hugs and cuddles. With a bean filled floppy body, this Mini Flopsie is a great cuddle buddy and even better friend. Top quality materials are used to ensure durability and softness. Suitable from birth About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings.
